title: Nathan Cassidy Weeee
description: Multi-award winning standup comic tells the story of how this year's Ashes series changed his life. A story of love, loss and Travis Head’s moustache. Last Christmas Day, Nathan Cassidy is alone in a basement, feverish and half-drunk, watching England getting destroyed in the Ashes. But as the Ashes slips further out of reach, something strange begins to happen... a surreal journey of survival, redemption and hope. From the award-winning star of 25 solo shows and one of comedy’s most original voices, this show is a hilarious and heart-opening journey through cricket, collapse, and the strange magic of Christmas. And, like all the best stories, like the ones his grandad used to tell him as a kid, this one might only be half true too. 13 Best Show wins/nominations in UK Comedy Festivals since 2019. Star of 3 Amazon Prime specials, BBC Radio 5 Live, and million downloaded podcast Daily Notes. Catch his other show Ewwww! at the Fringe too.
